topic: Gemini CLI Setup and Usage Guide for Developers in 2026

competitors.title: How to Install Gemini CLI: Complete Setup Guide for All Platforms (2026)
key_points: Comprehensive guide covering all 7 installation methods (npm, Homebrew, npx, etc.)
System requirements: Node.js 20+, macOS 15+, Windows 11, Ubuntu 20.04+
Free tier via Google OAuth: 60 requests per minute, 1,000 requests per day
Latest stable version v0.32.1 (March 2026) with Gemini 3 model, 1M token context
Open-source (Apache 2.0) with 96.6k GitHub stars
Authentication options: Google OAuth (recommended), API key, Vertex AI
Configuration via GEMINI.md project files and MCP server integration
Safety features: Plan Mode, sandbox mode via Docker/Podman, checkpointing

competitors.title: Gemini CLI Guide 2026: Google Search, Free Tier & Key Caveats
key_points: Positioning Gemini CLI as AI-powered search engine rather than just coding agent
Google Search grounding provides real-time information retrieval with citations
Pricing tiers: Free (Gemini Flash), AI Pro ($19.99/mo), AI Ultra ($249.99/mo)
Context window: 1M–2M tokens depending on plan
Five key features: Google Search Grounding, 1M token context, MCP support, multimodal input, GEMINI.md
Four caveats: free tier data may be used for training, rate limiting (429 errors), code deletion bug risk, requires constant internet

stats.fact: Gemini CLI free tier provides 60 requests per minute and 1,000 requests per day via Google OAuth
Gemini CLI uses Gemini 2.5 Pro model with 1 million token context window (expandable to 2M tokens on Ultra plan)
Gemini CLI GitHub repository has over 96,600 stars as of March 2026 (laozhang.ai) / ~60k stars (comparison)
Claude Code has 115,000 developers and processes 195 million lines of code weekly as of mid-2025
73% of engineering teams use AI coding tools daily, with Claude leading for complex tasks (44% of teams)
Gemini CLI is recognized as 'lightning-fast' with significantly quicker response times than competitors
Gemini CLI accuracy ranges 50-60% in benchmark tests vs Claude Code's 95% first-try correctness
Gemini CLI supports MCP (Model Context Protocol) with three transports: Stdio, SSE, and HTTP

angles: Gemini CLI as an AI-powered search engine for developers (Google Search grounding)
